languages.original_text: "I usually love legends, but in my experience they always have depressing endings for some reason. It would be stupid to expect anything different here."

languages.text: "Обычно я люблю легенды, но на моем веку все они почему-то все время заканчиваются мрачно. Будет глупо надеяться, что здесь нас ждет что-то иное".
"I usually love legends, but in my experience they always have depressing endings for some reason. It would be stupid to expect anything different here."
languages.original_text: "Обычно я люблю легенды, но на моем веку все они почему-то все время заканчиваются мрачно. Будет глупо надеяться, что здесь нас ждет что-то иное".

traits.locale_text: "I usually love legends, but in my experience they always have depressing endings for some reason. It would be stupid to expect anything different here."
"I usually love legends, but in my experience they always have depressing endings for some reason. It would be stupid to expect anything different here."
"I usually love legends, but in my experience they always have depressing endings for some reason. It would be stupid to expect anything different here."

languages.text: 「私はいつも伝説が好きだけど、なぜかいつも悲しい結末なんだ。ここでは違う結末を期待するのは愚かだ」
languages.original_text: "I usually love legends, but in my experience they always have depressing endings for some reason. It would be stupid to expect anything different here."

traits.locale_text: 「私はいつも伝説が好きだけど、なぜかいつも悲しい結末なんだ。ここでは違う結末を期待するのは愚かだ。」

languages.text: « J'adore les légendes, d'habitude, mais d'après mon expérience, elles ont toujours une fin déprimante. Inutile d'espérer que ça se terminera mieux ici. »
languages.original_text: "I usually love legends, but in my experience they always have depressing endings for some reason. It would be stupid to expect anything different here."

traits.locale_text: « J'adore les légendes, d'habitude, mais d'après mon expérience, elles ont toujours une fin déprimante. Inutile d'espérer que ça se terminera mieux ici. »

languages.text: "Ich liebe Legenden für gewöhnlich, aber meiner Erfahrung nach haben sie aus irgendeinem Grund immer ein trauriges Ende. Es wäre dumm, in diesem Fall etwas anderes zu erwarten."
languages.original_text: "I usually love legends, but in my experience they always have depressing endings for some reason. It would be stupid to expect anything different here."

traits.locale_text: "Ich liebe Legenden für gewöhnlich, aber meiner Erfahrung nach haben sie aus irgendeinem Grund immer ein trauriges Ende. Es wäre dumm, in diesem Fall etwas anderes zu erwarten."

languages.text: "Genelde efsaneleri severim ama tecrübelerime göre nedense sonları hep iç karartıcı oluyor. Burada farklı bir şey beklemek aptallık olur."
languages.original_text: "I usually love legends, but in my experience they always have depressing endings for some reason. It would be stupid to expect anything different here."

traits.locale_text: "Genelde efsaneleri severim ama tecrübelerime göre nedense sonları hep iç karartıcı oluyor. Burada farklı bir şey beklemek aptallık olur."

languages.text: «Normalmente adoro las leyendas, pero en mi experiencia siempre tienen un final deprimente por alguna razón. Esperar que este caso fuese distinto sería una estupidez».
languages.original_text: "I usually love legends, but in my experience they always have depressing endings for some reason. It would be stupid to expect anything different here."

traits.locale_text: «Normalmente adoro las leyendas, pero en mi experiencia siempre tienen un final deprimente por alguna razón. Esperar que este caso fuese distinto sería una estupidez».

languages.text: “我向来喜欢传说，但根据我的经验，它们总是莫名其妙地以令人沮丧的结局收尾。指望这里会有什么不同，那就太蠢了。”
languages.original_text: "I usually love legends, but in my experience they always have depressing endings for some reason. It would be stupid to expect anything different here."

traits.locale_text: “我向来喜欢传说，但根据我的经验，它们总是莫名其妙地以令人沮丧的结局收尾。指望这里会有什么不同，那就太蠢了。”
